title: pectinaria borealis
intro:
Pectinaria borealis, also known as the sea fan, is a type of marine invertebrate animal that belongs to the class of sea fans. However, I couldn't find any information on a plant with this name.

Instead, I can provide information about the Pectinaria plant, which is a type of sea fan or sea whip found in tropical and subtropical waters. Pectinaria sea fans are actually a type of marine invertebrate animal and not a plant.
